log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Kalashtar — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 10 falling damage. HP: 168/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kalashtar — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Kalashtar — Armored Escapist HP: 41/59
→ Kalashtar — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 4 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Kalashtar — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
Young Red Dragon attacks Kalashtar — Armored Escapist with Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 9 damage. Kalashtar — Armored Escapist HP: 32/59
